value_metric: comprehensiveness becomes a visible time-coverage grid instead of a source count: every enabled source x year-month cell has an item count or an explicit gap reason (source not yet active / not backfilled / no publications / fetch failed), with zero silently-unexplained holes and an alert on any hole that cannot be explained

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: gap detector over the coverage grid; not wired to production; backfilled/failed month sets come from the real T041/T042 backfill state when wired
